msg_idle_warning: %s in %d seconds. Move the mouse, press any key, or close this notice to cancel.
msg_autostart_disabled: IdleTrigger will no longer start with Windows.
cli_usage:
Usage: IdleTrigger <command>

Commands:
  sleep        Put the PC to sleep
  hibernate    Hibernate the PC
  shutdown     Shut down Windows
  restart      Restart Windows
  lock         Lock the workstation
  nosleep      Stay Awake (on|off|toggle|status)
  monitor      Idle monitor (on|off|status)
  autostart    Start with Windows (enable|disable|status)
  config:reload Reload the running tray configuration
  status       Show current status
  version      Show version
cli_error_sleep_unavailable: Sleep is not available on this system.
cli_error_hibernate_unavailable: Hibernation is not available on this system.
cli_error_tray_not_running: The tray application is not running.
cli_error_nosleep_requires_tray: Stay Awake requires the tray application to remain running.
cli_error_monitor_requires_tray: The idle monitor requires the tray application to remain running.
warning_config_defaults: Warning: failed to load the configuration; using defaults:
config_edit_hint: Changes apply automatically within a few seconds. Restart IdleTrigger or run config:reload to apply them immediately.
cli_unknown: Unknown command. Run without arguments to start the tray icon.
tip_lock: Lock the current Windows session now.
tip_quick_actions: Lock, sleep, hibernate, shut down, or restart. Save your work first.
tip_sleep: Put the system to sleep now.
tip_shutdown: Shut down now. Save your work first.
tip_restart: Restart now. Save your work first.
tip_nosleep: Prevent the PC from sleeping automatically while idle. Enabling this turns off the manual idle monitor; manual sleep or hibernate still works. Display and battery limits are available in the config file.
tip_idle: Run the selected action after the set time without keyboard or mouse input. Enabling this turns off manual Stay Awake; an automatic Stay Awake task pauses it temporarily and it resumes when that task ends.
tip_idle_warning: Show a cancellable reminder before an idle action. Mouse movement, any key, or closing the reminder cancels that occurrence; its duration is set in the config file.
tip_idle_enhanced: Use when a device or app repeatedly resets Windows idle time. Normal keyboard and mouse input still resets the timer.
tip_idle_timeout: Choose how long keyboard and mouse input must remain idle before the action runs.
tip_idle_action: Choose lock, sleep, hibernate, or shut down after the idle time is reached.
tip_theme: Switch Windows light/dark theme by time or sunrise/sunset. Manual location takes priority; IP location is optional.
tip_fullscreen: Pause automatic theme switching during fullscreen apps, presentations, or foreground game activity.
tip_battery_theme: Use dark mode on battery; restore the schedule on AC power.
tip_ip_location: Use public-IP location for sunrise/sunset. Results are cached for 24 hours; set coordinates to avoid network lookup.
tip_theme_switch: Switch between light and dark themes now.
tip_theme_repair: Reapply the current theme if windows or displays did not update.
tip_hotkeys: Win+Shift+S sleep; Win+Shift+L lock; Win+Shift+N toggles Stay Awake.
tip_autostart: Start in the tray after Windows sign-in; repair the path automatically.
tip_logging: Write diagnostics to IdleTrigger.log. Keep this off normally.
tip_language: Apply and save the language change now.
tip_config: Open IdleTrigger.toml in Notepad for advanced settings.
tip_exit: Exit the tray app and stop all active features.
tip_automation: Create time- or process-triggered tasks for Stay Awake, idle monitoring, and system actions. Battery and feature-conflict settings still apply.
automation_empty_body: Select New to create your first task.
automation_name_hint: Optional; leave blank to generate it from these settings.
automation_no_action_options: This action has no additional options.
automation_runtime_note: State actions are temporary. Tasks work only while IdleTrigger runs; system actions can be cancelled.
automation_invalid_detail: Check the date, time, days, process selection, and numeric ranges. System-action warnings must be at least 10 seconds.
automation_discard_confirm: Your changes have not been saved. Discard them and return to the task list?
automation_error_process_required: Choose at least one process for this trigger.
automation_error_date: Enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
automation_error_time: Enter a valid time in HH:MM format.
automation_error_end_time: Enter a valid end time in HH:MM format.
tip_automation_master: Pause all automatic tasks without deleting them.
tip_automation_list: Shows each task and trigger. Double-click a task to edit it.
tip_automation_toggle: Enable or disable the selected task.
tip_automation_action: State actions apply only while their task condition is active. Pause never rewrites the manual toggle and is released when the condition ends. System actions use built-in features only; commands, scripts, and other apps are never launched.
tip_automation_trigger: State actions can apply while processes run or during a time window. System actions can run on a schedule, when selected processes change from none running to any running, or after all selected processes exit.
tip_automation_date: Date for a one-time task, in YYYY-MM-DD format.
tip_automation_time: Enter a 24-hour time in HH:MM format.
tip_automation_end_time: A state task ends when this time window closes.
tip_automation_days: Choose one or more days when this task can run.
tip_process_logic: Any needs one match; All needs every selected process.
tip_choose_processes: Choose running process names or browse to a specific EXE file.
tip_keep_screen: Stay Awake normally prevents system sleep only. Enable this to also keep the display on.
tip_idle_minutes: Idle duration used when this task enables idle monitoring.
tip_warning_seconds: Show a cancellable countdown of at least 10 seconds before any system action.
tip_blocked_policy: At the scheduled time, skip or wait if the process condition is not met.
tip_max_wait: How long to wait for the condition. Used only with Wait until allowed.
process_picker_helper: A process name matches every same-name instance. You can also browse to a specific EXE file.
process_picker_invalid_exe: The selected file is not a valid Windows EXE file.
process_picker_loading_descriptions: The list is ready. Loading descriptions…
process_picker_privacy: Reads process names and EXE descriptions only. PIDs are not saved, and selected files are never launched.
process_picker_error: Could not read the process list: %s
process_picker_empty: No processes are available. Refresh in a moment.
process_picker_no_results: No matches. Clear the search and try again.
process_picker_load_failed: The process list could not be read. Select Refresh to try again.
tip_process_search: Filter this list by process name or description.
tip_process_refresh: Scan current processes now without clearing selections. The list also refreshes when this window becomes active again.
tip_process_browse: Choose a specific EXE file for matching. The file is never launched.
tip_process_cancel: Close without changing the process selection.
tip_process_confirm: Save this selection. PIDs are never stored.
